name: Crock Pot Barbecued Beef Brisket
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except brisket in the removable liner.
2. Add the brisket and turn to coat well with barbecue sauce.
3. Marinate for 3 to 4 hours, or overnight in the refrigerator.
4. Place the liner in the base of the crockpot.
5. Cover and cook on auto for 8 hours; or low for 9-11 hours; or high for 5-6 hours.
